name: Real Estate Management
description: Comprehensive real estate management — manage property listings, track tenants, handle rental contracts, and oversee property portfolios with lease management.
author: AENEWS

capabilities.name: searchProperties
capabilities.description: Search for properties by location, type, price, or status

capabilities.name: createListing
capabilities.description: Create a new property listing for rent or sale

capabilities.name: getContract
capabilities.description: Get rental contract with full terms and tenant details

capabilities.name: updateTenant
capabilities.description: Update tenant information or lease status

capabilities.name: deleteListing
capabilities.description: Remove a property listing from the market

capabilities.name: getProperty
capabilities.description: Get property details with media, features, and history

capabilities.name: searchTenants
capabilities.description: Search tenants by name, property, or lease status

permissions.name: Read
permissions.description: Read real estate data including properties, listings, and tenants

permissions.name: Write
permissions.description: Create/Update properties, listings, tenants, and contracts

permissions.name: Delete
permissions.description: Delete properties, listings, tenants, and contracts

permissions.name: Admin
permissions.description: Full real estate administration including pricing and commission settings
